spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing, uncluttered UI, mobile-first design. Use generous padding to make elements feel touch-friendly and safe.

grid_system.dashboard_cards: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-[#4169E1] text-white rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FF69B4] text-white rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-pink-600 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.accent: bg-[#32CD32] text-white rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-green-600 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#4169E1] text-[#4169E1] rounded-2xl px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] p-6 border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.base: rounded-xl border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4169E1] focus:bg-white transition-all outline-none w-full

backgrounds.description: Abstract pastel shapes background for Login screen

gallery.description: Joyful girl playing with wooden toys

meals.description: Kid at table with lunch container

instructions_to_main_agent.app_structure: Mobile-first dashboard with 3 distinct roles: Parent, Teacher, Admin. Use a unified layout wrapper with a bottom navigation bar for mobile and a side/top nav for desktop.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing: 1. `/login` -> Role selection or unified login. 2. `/parent/...` (Dashboard, Profile, Modulistica, Appointments). 3. `/teacher/...` (Dashboard/Advanced Griglia, Media Upload). 4. `/admin/...` (Dashboard, User/Class CRUD, Appointments, Modulistica Manager).
instructions_to_main_agent.ui_details: Background of the app must be `#FFFDD0`. Cards must be `#FFFFFF` with `rounded-2xl`. Use `#4169E1` as primary action color. Use `#FF69B4` and `#32CD32` for accents (e.g., badges, secondary buttons). Iconography should be `lucide-react`.
instructions_to_main_agent.footer_requirement: Every screen MUST include the footer: 'Realizzata da Omnia. Piattaforma conforme alle normative GDPR per il trattamento dei dati personali e la tutela dei minori.' Style it subtly (text-xs, text-center, text-gray-500, p-4).
instructions_to_main_agent.language: All text and labels MUST be in Italian.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`, `data-testid="parent-dashboard-card"`).
